Implements ECMA Object.prototype built-in methods like toString, valueOf, and hasOwnProperty.

# Purpose
The code defines several routines for the `Object.prototype` object in accordance with the ECMA-262 standard, version 5. These routines implement fundamental object methods that are part of the JavaScript language specification. The file includes functions such as `toString`, `valueOf`, `toLocaleString`, `hasOwnProperty`, `isPrototypeOf`, and `propertyIsEnumerable`. Each function corresponds to a method on the `Object.prototype` and provides the necessary logic to perform operations like converting an object to a string, checking if a property is owned by an object, determining if an object is in another object's prototype chain, and verifying if a property is enumerable.

The code is part of a larger system that implements ECMAScript built-in objects and their methods. It includes several header files that provide necessary utilities and definitions for memory allocation, exception handling, and object manipulation. The functions return `ecma_value_t` types, which must be managed using specific memory management functions like `ecma_free_value`. The code is structured to handle JavaScript objects and their properties, ensuring compliance with the ECMAScript specification by using helper functions and macros defined in the included headers.

### ecma\_builtin\_object\_prototype\_object\_to\_string<!-- {{#callable:ecma_builtin_object_prototype_object_to_string}} -->
[View Source →](<../../../../../../../../../src/fw/vendor/jerryscript/jerry-core/ecma/builtin-objects/ecma-builtin-object-prototype.c#L57>)

Returns the string representation of the object referred to by `this_arg`.
- **Inputs**:
    - ``this_arg``: The object for which the string representation is needed.
- **Logic and Control Flow**:
    - Calls [`ecma_builtin_helper_object_to_string`](<ecma-builtin-helpers.c.md#ecma_builtin_helper_object_to_string>) with `this_arg` as the argument.
    - Returns the result of the helper function call.
- **Output**: An `ecma_value_t` representing the string form of the object, which must be freed with `ecma_free_value`.
- **Functions Called**:
    - [`ecma_builtin_helper_object_to_string`](<ecma-builtin-helpers.c.md#ecma_builtin_helper_object_to_string>)

Converts the `this_arg` to an object and returns it.
- **Inputs**:
    - ``this_arg``: The value to convert to an object.
- **Logic and Control Flow**:
    - Call [`ecma_op_to_object`](<../operations/ecma-conversion.c.md#ecma_op_to_object>) with `this_arg` as the argument.
    - Return the result of [`ecma_op_to_object`](<../operations/ecma-conversion.c.md#ecma_op_to_object>).
- **Output**: An `ecma_value_t` representing the object form of `this_arg`.
- **Functions Called**:
    - [`ecma_op_to_object`](<../operations/ecma-conversion.c.md#ecma_op_to_object>)

### ecma\_builtin\_object\_prototype\_object\_to\_locale\_string<!-- {{#callable:ecma_builtin_object_prototype_object_to_locale_string}} -->
[View Source →](<../../../../../../../../../src/fw/vendor/jerryscript/jerry-core/ecma/builtin-objects/ecma-builtin-object-prototype.c#L87>)

Converts an object to a locale-specific string representation by calling its `toString` method.
- **Inputs**:
    - ``this_arg``: The object to convert to a locale-specific string.
- **Logic and Control Flow**:
    - Initialize `return_value` with an empty simple value.
    - Attempt to convert `this_arg` to an object using [`ecma_op_to_object`](<../operations/ecma-conversion.c.md#ecma_op_to_object>); if it fails, return the error value.
    - Retrieve the `toString` method from the object using [`ecma_op_object_get`](<../operations/ecma-objects.c.md#ecma_op_object_get>); if it fails, return the error value.
    - Check if the retrieved `toString` method is callable; if not, raise a type error.
    - If callable, invoke the `toString` method with `this_arg` and return the result.
    - Release the references to the `toString` method and the object.
- **Output**: An `ecma_value_t` representing the locale-specific string or an error if the operation fails.
- **Functions Called**:
    - [`ecma_make_simple_value`](<../base/ecma-helpers-value.c.md#ecma_make_simple_value>)
    - [`ecma_op_to_object`](<../operations/ecma-conversion.c.md#ecma_op_to_object>)
    - [`ecma_get_object_from_value`](<../base/ecma-helpers-value.c.md#ecma_get_object_from_value>)
    - [`ecma_get_magic_string`](<../base/ecma-helpers-string.c.md#ecma_get_magic_string>)
    - [`ecma_op_object_get`](<../operations/ecma-objects.c.md#ecma_op_object_get>)
    - [`ecma_op_is_callable`](<../operations/ecma-function-object.c.md#ecma_op_is_callable>)
    - [`ecma_raise_type_error`](<../operations/ecma-exceptions.c.md#ecma_raise_type_error>)
    - [`ecma_op_function_call`](<../operations/ecma-function-object.c.md#ecma_op_function_call>)
    - [`ecma_deref_ecma_string`](<../base/ecma-helpers-string.c.md#ecma_deref_ecma_string>)

### ecma\_builtin\_object\_prototype\_object\_has\_own\_property<!-- {{#callable:ecma_builtin_object_prototype_object_has_own_property}} -->
[View Source →](<../../../../../../../../../src/fw/vendor/jerryscript/jerry-core/ecma/builtin-objects/ecma-builtin-object-prototype.c#L133>)

Checks if an object has a property as its own (not inherited) property.
- **Inputs**:
    - ``this_arg``: The object on which to check for the property.
    - ``arg``: The property name to check, which will be converted to a string.
- **Logic and Control Flow**:
    - Initialize `return_value` with an empty simple value.
    - Convert `arg` to a string using [`ecma_op_to_string`](<../operations/ecma-conversion.c.md#ecma_op_to_string>) and store the result in `to_string_val`.
    - Convert `this_arg` to an object using [`ecma_op_to_object`](<../operations/ecma-conversion.c.md#ecma_op_to_object>) and store the result in `obj_val`.
    - Retrieve the string representation of the property name from `to_string_val`.
    - Retrieve the object from `obj_val`.
    - Check if the object has the property as its own property using `ecma_op_object_has_own_property`.
    - If the property exists, set `return_value` to true; otherwise, set it to false.
    - Finalize and clean up `obj_val` and `to_string_val`.
- **Output**: An `ecma_value_t` indicating true if the object has the property as its own property, otherwise false.
- **Functions Called**:
    - [`ecma_make_simple_value`](<../base/ecma-helpers-value.c.md#ecma_make_simple_value>)
    - [`ecma_op_to_string`](<../operations/ecma-conversion.c.md#ecma_op_to_string>)
    - [`ecma_op_to_object`](<../operations/ecma-conversion.c.md#ecma_op_to_object>)
    - [`ecma_get_string_from_value`](<../base/ecma-helpers-value.c.md#ecma_get_string_from_value>)
    - [`ecma_get_object_from_value`](<../base/ecma-helpers-value.c.md#ecma_get_object_from_value>)

### ecma\_builtin\_object\_prototype\_object\_is\_prototype\_of<!-- {{#callable:ecma_builtin_object_prototype_object_is_prototype_of}} -->
[View Source →](<../../../../../../../../../src/fw/vendor/jerryscript/jerry-core/ecma/builtin-objects/ecma-builtin-object-prototype.c#L179>)

Checks if an object is in the prototype chain of another object.
- **Inputs**:
    - ``this_arg``: The object to be checked as a prototype.
    - ``arg``: The object whose prototype chain is to be checked.
- **Logic and Control Flow**:
    - Check if `arg` is an object; if not, return `ECMA_SIMPLE_VALUE_FALSE`.
    - Convert `this_arg` to an object using [`ecma_op_to_object`](<../operations/ecma-conversion.c.md#ecma_op_to_object>).
    - Convert `arg` to an object using [`ecma_op_to_object`](<../operations/ecma-conversion.c.md#ecma_op_to_object>).
    - Use [`ecma_op_object_is_prototype_of`](<../operations/ecma-objects.c.md#ecma_op_object_is_prototype_of>) to check if the object from `this_arg` is a prototype of the object from `arg`.
    - Return `ECMA_SIMPLE_VALUE_TRUE` if it is a prototype, otherwise return `ECMA_SIMPLE_VALUE_FALSE`.
- **Output**: An `ecma_value_t` indicating `ECMA_SIMPLE_VALUE_TRUE` if `this_arg` is a prototype of `arg`, otherwise `ECMA_SIMPLE_VALUE_FALSE`.
- **Functions Called**:
    - [`ecma_make_simple_value`](<../base/ecma-helpers-value.c.md#ecma_make_simple_value>)
    - [`ecma_op_to_object`](<../operations/ecma-conversion.c.md#ecma_op_to_object>)
    - [`ecma_get_object_from_value`](<../base/ecma-helpers-value.c.md#ecma_get_object_from_value>)
    - [`ecma_op_object_is_prototype_of`](<../operations/ecma-objects.c.md#ecma_op_object_is_prototype_of>)

### ecma\_builtin\_object\_prototype\_object\_property\_is\_enumerable<!-- {{#callable:ecma_builtin_object_prototype_object_property_is_enumerable}} -->
[View Source →](<../../../../../../../../../src/fw/vendor/jerryscript/jerry-core/ecma/builtin-objects/ecma-builtin-object-prototype.c#L224>)

Checks if a property of an object is enumerable.
- **Inputs**:
    - ``this_arg``: The object on which to check the property.
    - ``arg``: The property name to check for enumerability.
- **Logic and Control Flow**:
    - Initialize `return_value` with an empty simple value.
    - Convert `arg` to a string using [`ecma_op_to_string`](<../operations/ecma-conversion.c.md#ecma_op_to_string>) and store the result in `to_string_val`.
    - Convert `this_arg` to an object using [`ecma_op_to_object`](<../operations/ecma-conversion.c.md#ecma_op_to_object>) and store the result in `obj_val`.
    - Retrieve the property from the object using [`ecma_op_object_get_own_property`](<../operations/ecma-objects.c.md#ecma_op_object_get_own_property>).
    - If the property is found, check if it is enumerable using `ecma_is_property_enumerable` and set `return_value` to a boolean value accordingly.
    - If the property is not found, set `return_value` to `ECMA_SIMPLE_VALUE_FALSE`.
    - Finalize the `obj_val` and `to_string_val` values.
- **Output**: An `ecma_value_t` indicating whether the property is enumerable (`true`) or not (`false`).
- **Functions Called**:
    - [`ecma_make_simple_value`](<../base/ecma-helpers-value.c.md#ecma_make_simple_value>)
    - [`ecma_op_to_string`](<../operations/ecma-conversion.c.md#ecma_op_to_string>)
    - [`ecma_op_to_object`](<../operations/ecma-conversion.c.md#ecma_op_to_object>)
    - [`ecma_get_string_from_value`](<../base/ecma-helpers-value.c.md#ecma_get_string_from_value>)
    - [`ecma_get_object_from_value`](<../base/ecma-helpers-value.c.md#ecma_get_object_from_value>)
    - [`ecma_op_object_get_own_property`](<../operations/ecma-objects.c.md#ecma_op_object_get_own_property>)
